facebook.caption:
This place fixes a bad travel day.

Sunset Sanato Beach Club on Đường Bào hits different when the sky turns orange. Cold drink in hand, feet near the sand, no rush. $15-30 a head and you're sitting front-row for the best light Phu Quoc throws at you. 2,652 people rated it 4.0 stars. The crowd is real, the vibe is earned.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sky do its thing over Sunset Sanato Beach Club. Drinks, sand, golden hour. This is the $15-30 Phu Quoc evening you came here for. 2,652 reviews say don't skip it.
